GPIO Configuration Register 2

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x70
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only encoded port width parameters. Present only when GPIO_ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS=True.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:20] reserved rw 0x0 -
[19:15] pwidth_d r 0x7 PWIDTH_D
[14:10] pwidth_c r 0x7 PWIDTH_C
[9:5] pwidth_b r 0x7 PWIDTH_B
[4:0] pwidth_a r 0x1f PWIDTH_A

Field Descriptions

pwidth_d - PWIDTH_D

Port D width minus 1 (GPIO_PWIDTH_D-1).

pwidth_c - PWIDTH_C

Port C width minus 1 (GPIO_PWIDTH_C-1).

pwidth_b - PWIDTH_B

Port B width minus 1 (GPIO_PWIDTH_B-1).

pwidth_a - PWIDTH_A

Port A width minus 1 (GPIO_PWIDTH_A-1).
